metadata.description: Standalone marketplace for the EDPA plugin. Lets users do `/plugin marketplace add technomaton/edpa` and install the plugin without going through the technomaton-hub indirection. Marketplace name matches Claude Code's auto-derived cache dirname (`~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/technomaton-edpa/`) so the registered name is consistent across the install surface. The hub also distributes the same plugin as `tm-edpa@technomaton-hub` — both paths land on identical payload (technomaton/edpa@plugin).

plugins.name: edpa
plugins.description: EDPA — Evidence-Driven Proportional Allocation. Derive hours from Git delivery evidence. Zero timesheets, Monte Carlo calibrated CW weights, bidirectional sync with GitHub Projects.
